subject: Re: Bell 407
body:
yes,,make it new

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

> Jeffrey, I need to change the leather in the cockpit
> seats,I was planning on 
> doing same blue to match rear seats,,,do you wish to
> change leather in rear 
> cabin and carpet.??
> If so, I will send some 407 designs they have
> here.and pricing..
> we may be able to go Tan with Blue piping to match
> exterior, your thoughts?
> pls advise
> LV
>
